title: Fix Keyboard Shortcut Mismatch (Ctrl+Y)
summary: Ctrl+Y is shown in shortcuts overlay but not wired. Add Ctrl+Y as redo alias and update overlay text.

tasks.description: Add Ctrl+Y keybinding as redo alias. Update shortcuts overlay to show Ctrl+Shift+Z / Ctrl+Y.

testing_focus: Press Ctrl+Y and verify redo works
